usage_notes: May copy with attribution and share-alike obligations; record exact image page and license in manifest before adding asset.
May reuse code/assets under MIT; include copyright/license notice for substantial copied material.
Use generator for project-specific diagrams; generated project diagrams must be labeled as generated, not standard screenshots.

allowed_basis: PlantUML license states generated images are owned by corresponding source-code author
usage_notes: This applies to diagrams generated from our own PlantUML sources, not to copying PlantUML documentation images.
